message:
fix(cli): extend orphaned-flag validation to search, related, burndown, and alert modifiers

Add 6 more orphaned-modifier checks: --search without --robot-search,
--related-include-closed without --robot-related, burndown flags
(--sprint-label, --sprint-start, --sprint-end) without --robot-burndown,
and --alert-stale-days without --robot-alerts. Each returns a descriptive
error with exit code 2.

New integration tests for all new modifier-without-parent combinations.
Clean up stale .beads/recovery snapshots from 2026-03-27.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
